title: YTP: Sonic gives some disturbing advice.....
description:
This is the first "youtube poop" (as someone told me they're called) that i ever made. I used a Sonic Says segment and audio from various things to make it. It's pretty funny I think, enjoy.  

Sorry about the bad video quality.....

EDIT: wow this video is SO overrated XD yet somehow it's become my most popular video. I'm actually surprised people still watch this.
